feed.title: Bhavy Khatri
feed.subtitle: Full stack software developer at Microsoft, IIT Kanpur grad in CSE, UX enthusiast

entry.title: United We Stand, Even though Only I Fell

link.title: United We Stand, Even though Only I Fell

entry.summary: I got sprained ankle while I was jumping in sky zone trampoline park, Hyderabad. There was a game where you have to take a bigger jump from trampoline and land on a big spongy mat. The mistake I did was that I didn’t waited few times for higher jumps instead pre-maturely jumped on the other side, in the process my ankle got badly twisted. I was on the spongy mat side of arena where stability wa...

entry.title: Learnings from Fixing Build Failures of a Framework at Microsoft

link.title: Learnings from Fixing Build Failures of a Framework at Microsoft

entry.summary: What does not kill me makes me stronger - Nietzsche I had to ship a feature which required change in the codebase which no one in my team worked on for last 2 years. Worse they merged the PR without deploying it. Weird huh? Well it was because there was no automatic CI and CD you have to do the changes create a nuget package and upload to a production feed. Then merge the PR. But our geni...

entry.title: Covid-19 First Hand Experience of Omicron Variant

link.title: Covid-19 First Hand Experience of Omicron Variant

entry.summary: I have been tested positive with covid, although no genomic sequencing is done but most probably it is due to omicron variant only which is sweeping across all over the world including India. Also I was vaccinated with both the doses of Covishield (Adenovirus based) vaccine. The cases are mostly supposed to be mild but how does a mild symptoms looks like, here is a day wise report of symptoms ...

entry.title: On Career: A Basic Guide to Why and How

link.title: On Career: A Basic Guide to Why and How

entry.summary: Let’s first talk about why thinking about career goals is extremely important. Or in other words what happens if you don’t have a career goal. If you have no career goals then it would be journey without any destination, you will be going ahead but you won’t know where you are going, its like sailing in ocean aimlessly, sometimes you will reach some random place but since you really don’t know ...
